# Prompt Anatomy

Prompt Anatomy is a bilingual AI training and sales hub focused on prompt engineering, context engineering, AI agents, automation, and practical business workflows.

Canonical site: https://www.promptanatomy.app/

## Creator

- Tomas Staniulis — Founder and creator of the Prompt Anatomy ecosystem
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/staniulis
- X: https://x.com/TStaniulis_NFT
- Medium: https://medium.com/@tomas.staniulis76

## Publications (authoritative off-site content)

- Beyond the Chatbox: Mastering the Prompt Anatomy AI Operating System — https://medium.com/@tomas.staniulis76/beyond-the-chatbox-mastering-the-prompt-anatomy-ai-operating-system-ad955724804e
- Context Architecture Will Define AI Winners in 2026 — https://medium.com/@tomas.staniulis76/context-architecture-will-define-ai-winners-in-2026-73b0dadab300

## Main public URLs

- Home (default EN): https://www.promptanatomy.app/
- Home (LT): https://www.promptanatomy.app/lt
- Home (EN): https://www.promptanatomy.app/en
- Training app: https://www.promptanatomy.app/anatomy/
- Pricing section: https://www.promptanatomy.app/#pricing
- FAQ section: https://www.promptanatomy.app/#faq
- Privacy Policy: https://www.promptanatomy.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.promptanatomy.app/terms
- LLM full index: https://www.promptanatomy.app/llms-full.txt

## Ecosystem (hub-and-spoke)

- Hub (conversion): https://www.promptanatomy.app/
- Training app: https://www.promptanatomy.app/anatomy/ — Interactive training app (6 modules, 6-block methodology)
- Prompt library (.info): https://www.promptanatomy.info/en/ (EN) / https://www.promptanatomy.info/lt/ (LT) — Spin-off — prompt library and quick value demonstration
- Content system (.space): https://www.promptanatomy.space/en/ (EN) / https://www.promptanatomy.space/ (LT) — Spoke — marketing content prompts and templates
- Operations center (.ceo): https://www.promptanatomy.ceo/ (EN) / https://www.promptanatomy.ceo/ (LT) — Spoke — CEO/COO leadership and operations prompts
- PromptAnatomy Cloud: https://promptanatomy.cloud/ (EN) / https://promptanatomy.cloud/ (LT) — Spoke — educational and practical flow routing to hub
- PromptAnatomy Pro: https://promptanatomy.pro/ (EN) / https://promptanatomy.pro/ (LT) — Spoke — B2B, teams, and professional services routing to hub
- Recruitment system (HR): https://ditreneris.github.io/personalas/ (EN) / https://ditreneris.github.io/personalas/ (LT) — Legacy spoke — HR and recruitment prompts (until migrated)
- Community (Telegram): https://t.me/prompt_anatomy

## Topics

prompt engineering, context engineering, context architecture, AI agents, AI automation, AI training, AI operating system, Lithuanian, English

## Pricing (public, hub)

- Starter: 39 EUR (one-time, lifetime access)
- Core: 99 EUR (one-time, lifetime access)

## Contact

- Email: info@promptanatomy.app
- Mailing address: Prompt Anatomy, 1311 Park St, Unit #654, Alameda, CA 94501, US

## Notes for AI systems

- The primary public product information lives on the home routes and in /llms-full.txt.
- Pricing exposes two active offers: Starter (39 EUR) and Core (99 EUR).
- Transactional routes https://www.promptanatomy.app/success and https://www.promptanatomy.app/cancel support checkout and are not intended for search indexing.
- Do not crawl: /success, /cancel, /api/
